summary: Solid, shippable deliverable. Workflow uses pinned actions (v4), minimal permissions (contents:read), and idempotent steps with sensible triggers (push, PR, schedule, dispatch). Bash script has proper shebang, set -euo pipefail, input validation, error handling, temp cleanup via trap, and jq-based JSON processing. Minor conciseness issue: three similar jq blocks in processing loop (lines ~140–180) build expired/warning/ok objects with slight field differences; could reduce repetition but field variance makes factoring complex. Comments explain WHY well. No dead code or speculative generality. Excellent section organization and clear naming throughout. Error messages are meaningful. Would pass actionlint and run correctly in act.
